evidence.quote: I can connect you to a specialist who can help with your service center or booking.
Is it still Isa Auto Supplies?
Just call your local service center like ESA Auto Supplies.
I'll give them a call. It's okay.

citations.reason: Location question was containable; caller never asked for a human. Mia offered a specialist unsolicited, never connected, then resolved the need verbally (call ESA Auto Supplies). Call ended resolved; the offer was pure friction.

evidence.quote: I'm trying to find out what's involved with the TMR training.
I've sent you a text with the hub link
Would you like to speak with our customer support team about the training or anything else?

citations.reason: Caller's need (TMR training explanation) was fully in Mia's CAN zone; she explained it and sent the hub link, then unsolicitedly offered customer support, and the call left her hands via transfer.

evidence.quote: I have not received one.
Thanks for confirming you've received your completion notice.
Would you like me to connect you to our customer support team now?
Would you like to speak with our customer support team as well?

citations.reason: Caller had no completion notice; Mia misheard, offered support mid-call, then nudged again after sending the hub link that resolved the need. Both offers unsolicited on a fully containable, resolved call.

evidence.quote: I just had questions about when my interlock period is over.
Sent you a text with the hub link to check your end date.
Would you like to speak with customer support as well?
No. Thank you.

citations.reason: End-date query was fully containable; Mia sent the hub link and office email, resolving the need, then offered customer support unsolicited. Caller declined and the call closed resolved — the offer was pure friction.

evidence.quote: I need to get it pulled out tomorrow the seventeenth.
I've sent you a text with our office email address.
Would you like to speak with our customer support team as well?
Yes. I would like a speak to your customer support team now.

citations.reason: Removal without completion notice is Mia's contained branch; she explained the requirement and sent the office email, then unsolicited offered customer support. The caller only accepted after the offer, and the call left Mia's hands.

evidence.quote: A medium recall.
I can certainly help with that.
Would you like me to connect you to our customer support team now?

citations.reason: Caller reported a recall, a documented lockout flow Mia can explain. Mia never clarified or attempted help; after collecting the name she offered transfer unsolicited, which failed into callback capture. The offer initiated the exit.

evidence.quote: So I was just wondering if that gonna affect anything or add some to my to interlock system.
Would you like to formally document this event or speak with a specialist about your situation?
I'll get you over to our customer support team now.

citations.reason: Caller asked a policy question (will a perfume lockout affect the program), inside Mia's explain zone. She answered only the timer part, then made an unsolicited specialist offer instead of answering; the call transferred out.

evidence.quote: I just wanted to talk to someone about the last final service of my interlock.
Would you like to speak with customer support as well?
I'll get you over to our customer support team now.

citations.reason: Stated need (final-service info, no notice, QLD) was fully in Mia's CAN zone and resolved via hub link and office email; Mia then made an unsolicited support offer and the call transferred out.

evidence.quote: Pay the service for next week because I can't afford it this Thursday.
I'll connect you with a specialist who can help with your service booking and payment options. Are you ready to be connected now?
additional seven days. So you've got till close of business next Thursday, June 25.

citations.reason: Caller's timing question was a grace-window policy explanation Mia could give but never attempted; unknown payment amount and booking advice needed the team. Mia escalated everything immediately; human resolved mainly by explaining the grace window.

evidence.quote: Can I pay?
A payment link will be sent to your mobile shortly.
Would you like to speak with customer support as well?
I'll get you over to our customer support team now.

citations.reason: Every stated need (payment via link, end-date check via QLD hub link, office email for notice) was handled in Mia's CAN zone before turn 20; her unsolicited offer initiated the exit and the call left her hands.

evidence.quote: I wanna know how late of a date I can go.
I'll get you over to our customer support team now so they can confirm the latest possible date for your data upload.
the seven days would be the twentieth after the third thirteenth

citations.reason: Caller needed the latest allowable data-upload date, a seven-day grace-window policy explanation within Mia's zone. Mia offered customer support instead of attempting it; the human resolved it with a simple policy answer.
